criteria.reason: Agent creation preview now exposes a unified estimate for compile, preview, run, external action, and operator chat.
Agent metrics expose actual billing facts in the same ledger shape as the estimate.
Run observability exposes unified billing facts and avoids double-counting action boundary tokens.
Agents cockpit now answers what the agent does, whether it is ready, what is missing, and the last run.
Agents UI shows estimate before launch and actual fact after launch in the billing panel.
Full agent blueprint suite, frontend build, and diff check passed without schema migration.
